subcodes.first_line: The verses have indeed been sent down and the signs have been manifested, yet the people comprehend not. The appointed time hath come and the Cause hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الآیات و ظهرت العلامات و القوم لا یفقهون قد اتی المیقات و ظهر الامر و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @proclamation to the people of the world, @Manifestation of God as sun
